title: Plans for Wano and Sanji
description: On pages 10–13, this part focuses on plans for wano and sanji within the Momonosuke, Heir of Kozuki storyline.
scene: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #9
dialogue.text: There's a safe place we can go!

dialogue.speaker: Momonosuke
dialogue.text: Your father... is a foolish lord.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Kaidou is the enemy of my par-ents!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Even my mother fell by his hand!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: Even I wish to become an adult, big and strong,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: So I can get vengeance for my FA- their and mother!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: I want to protect my retainers!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: that sentiment alone... is more than enough...!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: You're just an old softie now, aren't ya.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: But... I am small. I cannot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #10
dialogue.text: That is why I wish for you to fight alongside us!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: I'll take down kaidou for ya!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #11
dialogue.text: 01. You're supposed to shake it. shake it.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: though he may have "sounded off" on a mere 8-year- old,

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: I guess, more so than any of us, Luffy- Dono...

dialogue.speaker: Kinemon
dialogue.text: thinks of Lord Momonosukee as an adult.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: You're right. ADMIR- ABLE FAITH INDEED.

dialogue.speaker: Law
dialogue.text: Straw hat-ya. What about your faith in me? You never asked for my opinion!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Hm? But you're fine with it, aren't you?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #12
dialogue.text: Beat the living crap out of Kaidou, we hereby form the...

dialogue.speaker: Raizo
dialogue.text: Do we really need the Ninja part?

summary: Plans for Wano and Sanji: On Zou, the Straw Hats and their allies uncover the Mink Tribe’s suffering, Sanji’s disappearance, Raizo’s secret, and the road toward both Wano and Big Mom.
